particulars.description: The freehold property known as 231 eldon street, ashton on ribble, preston, PR2 2BB, registered at hm land registry under title number LA937409, including all buildings and fixtures and fittings and fixed plant and machinery that are situated on or form part of the property at any time.

A specific equitable charge over all freehold and leasehold properties and/or the proceeds of sale thereof fixed and floating charges over undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts and the benefits of any licences.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
